Description: The AMS1117 is a family of three-terminal, positive, low-dropout linear voltage regulators capable of providing up to 1A of output current. It is available in both adjustable and fixed output voltage versions (1.5V, 1.8V, 2.5V, 2.85V, 3.3V, 5.0V). The device is designed to operate with a low input-to-output voltage differential, featuring a guaranteed maximum dropout voltage of 1.3V at full load, which decreases at lower currents. It includes on-chip trimming for reference voltage accuracy and built-in current limiting for overload protection.

KeyParameters.Dropout Voltage: 1.3V (Max at 1A), typical operation down to 1V differential

Functions.FunctionDescription: For fixed-voltage versions, this pin is ground. For adjustable versions, this pin connects to the feedback resistor divider.
Regulated output voltage. Must be connected to a capacitor for stability.
Unregulated input voltage supply. Must be connected to a capacitor.
